title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin showcases an AI video generation workflow using Claude Code that automates the entire production pipeline from idea to polished video, including planning, coding, voice, visuals, and music. The system uses Archon as the workflow engine and HyperFrames as the generation framework, requiring only a single command to produce finished video content.
